ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "entrez_id" INTEGER /* Entrez Gene ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function and relevance to diseases */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand (positive or negative) on which the gene is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene it is associated with */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease associated with the variant */,
  "doid" INTEGER /* Disease Ontology ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNP, insertion, deletion) */,
  "alt_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele of the variant */,
  "ref_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele of the variant */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the variant in the population */,
  "clinical_significance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinical significance of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_clinical_significance_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_significance_id") REFERENCES clinical_significance ("significance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the disease */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the disease in the population */,
  "inheritance_pattern" TEXT /* Inheritance pattern of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  "indications" TEXT /* Diseases or conditions for which the drug is indicated */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the drug was approved by regulatory authorities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated genetic variant */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated drug */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., Diagnostic, Predictive) */,
  "evidence_direction" TEXT /* Direction of evidence (e.g., Supports, Does Not Support) */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance (e.g., Positive, Resistance) */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Detailed statement describing the evidence */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the related study */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the study */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the evidence quality */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the evidence (e.g., clinical trial, observational study) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evidence (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_pubmed_id FOREIGN KEY ("pubmed_id") REFERENCES pubmed_articles ("pubmed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_clinical_significance FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_significance") REFERENCES clinical_significance ("significance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pubmed_articles" (
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PubMed article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the article was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pubmed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_significance" (
  "significance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical significance level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the significance level */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clinical significance (e.g., pathogenic, benign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("significance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Permission ID of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role-permission relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
